prompt: Create a vertical dark gothic fantasy portrait of an elegant young woman in a lush shadowy floral setting. She is shown from the back and shoulders, turning her head in a three-quarter profile toward the viewer, with pale porcelain skin, soft lips, and a calm melancholic expression. Give her a short black bob haircut mostly hidden beneath a dramatic sheer black lace veil that drapes over her face, hair, shoulders, and down to the right side, with intricate floral lace patterns clearly visible across one eye and over her translucent sleeves. Dress her in a black sheer lace gown with embroidered floral appliqué and delicate transparent fabric revealing the silhouette of her shoulders and upper back. Behind her place a large warm ivory full moon or circular halo centered high in the composition, partially stained and surrounded by ink-wash splatters, smoky brush textures, thorny vines, and dark botanical silhouettes. Surround the subject with abundant flowers and foliage: visible cream-white blossoms on the left side near her shoulder, smaller beige flowers woven into the veil and background, dark leaves and branches framing the moon, plus two large blurred cream flowers in the extreme foreground at the bottom for depth. Use a moody sepia, black, charcoal, and antique ivory color palette with soft cinematic rim light from the moon, painterly realism, high-detail lace, atmospheric haze, shallow depth of field, and a romantic dark-art editorial fashion mood. Canvas should be a tall 9:16 portrait, subject centered slightly left, no text, no watermark, no modern objects.
